info.name: Study Deck Backend API - MVP Flow
info.description: Layered Spring Boot backend collection for the Knowt/Anki-style Study Deck MVP. Run folders in numeric order. Requests use collection variables and realistic sample data for English vocabulary learning with Vietnamese definitions. Base URL defaults to local Spring Boot at http://localhost:8080.

item.name: 00 Setup - Folder, Deck, Cards

response.name: 201 Created - English Vocabulary folder
response.body:
{
  "id": 1,
  "name": "English Vocabulary Practice",
  "description": "Academic English words with Vietnamese meanings for daily student review.",

}

item.description: Create realistic content first. These requests capture IDs into collection variables for later folders.

item.name: 01 Deck Study Surfaces

response.name: 200 OK - English vocabulary deck summary
response.body:
{
  "deckId": 1,
  "title": "Academic English Words - MVP Demo",
  "description": "Deck used to exercise CRUD, SRS, learn, practice test, sorting, and matching with English-Vietnamese flashcards.",
  "flashcardCount": 3,
  "starredCount": 1,
  "studiedByCount": 0,
  "rating": 0.0
}

item.description: Read-only deck screens used by dashboard, flashcard viewer, and swipe/card-sorting UI.

item.name: 02 Flashcard Sorting Mode

response.name: 201 Created - English vocabulary sorting session
response.body:
{
  "id": 1,
  "deckId": 1,
  "status": "ACTIVE",
  "starredOnly": false,
  "shuffle": true,
  "totalItems": 3,
  "knownCount": 0,
  "doNotKnowCount": 0,
  "items": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "flashcardId": 1,
      "term": "diligent learner",
      "definition": "người học chăm chỉ và có kỷ luật",
      "position": 0,
      "answer": null
    }
  ]
}

item.name: Answer sorting item - Do not know

item.description: Tinder-like Know / Do Not Know sorting flow.

item.name: 03 Spaced Repetition - FSRS
Create SRS review session - due cards snapshot

response.name: 200 OK - FSRS Again review result for diligent learner

item.name: Get persisted SRS session - expected MVP 400

response.name: 400 Bad Request - SRS sessions not persisted in MVP
response.body:
{
  "status": 400,
  "error": "Bad Request",
  "message": "SRS review sessions are not persisted in MVP.",
  "path": "/api/v1/srs/review-sessions/1",
  "timestamp": "2026-06-11T02:23:00Z",
  "fieldErrors": []
}

item.name: Review persisted SRS session - expected MVP 400

item.description: FSRS/Anki-like review flow. MVP exposes direct card reviews; persisted SRS review sessions intentionally return 400.

item.description: Create a matching board, mark matched items, and complete the timed session.

item.name: 07 Cleanup - Destructive
item.description: Optional cleanup routes. Run only when you are done with demo data.

variable.description: Captured from 00 Setup / Create first flashcard.
Use an item id from sorting session response.
Use an item id from learn session response.
Use an item id from matching session response.
Use a question id from practice test response.
Placeholder only. SRS sessions are not persisted in MVP.
